intro: Echo Valley — a hidden land where creatures born of sound and light drift through the wilds.
They are called ECHOES. You have just arrived in Echo Rest, the valley's cozy village.
Today, Warden Odalie is giving every new keeper their first Echo. Your journey begins!

stages.title: A New Keeper
stages.objective: Choose your first Echo and head north to Route 1.
stages.hint: Pick a starter on the title screen, then leave town through the north gate.

stages.title: First Steps
stages.objective: Win your first battle against a wild Echo on Route 1.
stages.hint: Walk through tall grass to find wild Echoes, then win a battle.

stages.title: The Rival
stages.objective: Defeat Rival Sabo deep in the Echowood (Route 2).
stages.hint: Sabo waits near the north of Route 2.

stages.title: Across the Scorch
stages.objective: Cross the desert and defeat the Sun Warden on Scorch Route 3.
stages.hint: The Sun Warden guards the far desert.

stages.title: Heart of the Jungle
stages.objective: Reach the Verdant grove and defeat the Grove Elder.
stages.hint: The Grove Elder trains in Verdant Route 3.

stages.title: Settle the Score
stages.objective: Face Rival Sabo one last time in the grove.
stages.hint: Sabo makes a final stand in Verdant Route 3.

stages.title: Valley Champion
stages.objective: You are the Champion of Echo Valley! Keep exploring and completing your Echo log.
stages.hint: Try to catch and evolve every Echo!
